_description: Proto/Protobuf support configuration for Metals VS Code extension. To enable protobuf support, merge these entries into the main package.json file. This enables syntax highlighting and LSP features for .proto files.

_instructions.step1: Add 'onLanguage:proto' to the 'activationEvents' array in package.json
_instructions.step2: Add the language object from 'languages_to_add' to 'contributes.languages' array
_instructions.step3: Add the grammar object from 'grammars_to_add' to 'contributes.grammars' array
_instructions.step4: Reload VS Code or the extension to apply changes
